name: RecipeBook
tagline: TBC profession recipe browser with source tracking and waypoint integration
description: Browse every TBC profession recipe organized by source type. Track what you know across all your characters, build per-character wishlists, and filter by continent, zone, phase, and faction. Set TomTom waypoints to vendors and trainers via AddressBook. 12 professions supported with collapsible source categories, search, and shift-click recipe linking.

features.title: 12 Professions
features.description: Every TBC recipe for Alchemy, Blacksmithing, Cooking, Enchanting, Engineering, First Aid, Fishing, Jewelcrafting, Leatherworking, Mining, Poisons, and Tailoring.

features.title: Source Browsing
features.description: Recipes grouped by how you obtain them — Trainer, Vendor, Quest, Drop, and more. Collapsible sections let you focus on what matters.

features.title: Cross-Character Viewing
features.description: Browse any character's professions, known recipes, and wishlists from a single dropdown. See their skill levels and learnable recipes.

features.title: Wishlists & Ignore
features.description: Right-click to add recipes to a per-character wishlist (gold star) or ignore list (strikethrough). Wishlist info appears on recipe tooltips game-wide.

features.title: Known Tracking
features.description: Open your profession window and RecipeBook scans what you've learned. Toggle Hide Known to see only recipes you still need.

features.title: Zone & Phase Filtering
features.description: Filter by continent, zone, and content phase. Auto-detect mode filters to your current location automatically.

features.title: Waypoint Integration
features.description: Click to set TomTom waypoints to recipe vendors and trainers via AddressBook.

features.title: Faction-Aware
features.description: Filters opposite-faction vendors and quests. Non-BoP vendor recipes stay visible (tradeable via neutral AH) with opposite-faction vendors marked (A) or (H).

screenshots.alt: RecipeBook main window showing profession recipes grouped by source
screenshots.caption: Browse profession recipes organized by source type with filtering and tracking
